ul.li: Resolution: The state field is the primary driver for the linker's resolution loop.
Conflict Logic: is_strong allows deterministic selection between multiple definitions (STB_WEAK vs STB_GLOBAL).
COMMON Management: common_size and common_align are aggregated during the first pass to determine .bss section expansion.
Relocation Phase: final_address is strictly read-only after the address assignment phase of the linker completes.

div.p: Offset | Field Name | Data Type [Size] | Technical Description

g.text: st_value: Offset relative to section start
st_size: Total byte size of symbol
File index of first site to reference
